items.name: Witch's White Alchemical Backpack [3.0]
items.description: Embark on magical journeys with the Witch's Alchemical Backpack! This intricately designed backpack features beautifully carved leather, glowing runes, and mystical symbols. Adorned with enchanted mushrooms, glowing crystals, and vibrant foliage, it's perfect for those who explore both mystical realms and natural wonders. Carry all your essential items while showcasing a unique blend of magic and craftsmanship. Ideal for any adventurer with a touch of the arcane in their heart. Other colors: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=alchemical%20backpack&Category=1&CreatorName=blue%20infinity%20studios&salesTypeFilter=1
